guidance: Strong FY27 revenue growth as two acquisitions consolidate into results.
Acquisitions to add >₹60cr EBITDA at ~50% margins in FY27.
Sector-consolidation play; scouting further O&M M&A despite limited India targets.
insights: Q4 rev ₹120cr +40%; EBITDA ₹57cr +93% (~47% margin); PAT ₹28cr +340% YoY.
O&M portfolio 13+ GW (10.5 GW wind); order book 3.1 GW, 24+ months visibility.
Machine availability ~96.5%; added 600 MW to order book in FY26.
Two O&M acquisitions to consolidate in FY27 at ~50% EBITDA margin.
concall.orderExecution: 3.1 GW multi-year O&M order book gives 24+ months of annuity-like recurring revenue visibility.
concall.source: Inox Green Q4 FY26 analyst call, May 29 2026; Yahoo/GuruFocus, Business Standard, InvestyWise
